summary: A recorded Congressional hearing in which a Representative (Mr. Guest) asks yes/no questions in rapid succession to a witness panel (Coast Guard's Admiral Allan, TSA's Ms. McNeill, USCIS's Mr. Andersen, FEMA's Ms. Barton) about employees going unpaid during the government shutdown and the impact on their missions. Static C-SPAN-style committee footage with spoken question and answer exchanges. There is no music.
notable_text: ADMIRAL ALLAN U.S. Coast Guard; Ms. McNEILL Transportation Security Administration (TSA); MR. ANDERSEN; MS. BARTON; MR. GUEST
